name: Chocolate Creme Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart heavy saucepan, combine evaporated milk, sugar, salt, and butter.
2. Heat over medium-low heat until the mixture reaches a rolling boil, stirring constantly.
3. Cook for an additional 5 minutes. If the heat is too high, it may scorch.
4. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted.
5. Quickly add marshmallow creme, vanilla, and nuts, then stir until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan and spread to an even layer.
7. Cover and chill until firm. Cut into squares and serve. Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
